{{CargoRelic
|name=Nipkow Disk
|class_id=22100
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=08-28
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.26%), Wishing (0.14%)
|description=On Aug 28, 1884 AD, the German inventor Nipkow invented the Nipkow disk.<br>It is a thick disc with small holes. It works by breaking an image into small dots and converting optical signals from these dots into electrical signals. These signals are then sent to a receiver to produce an image. This technology enabled simple image transmission, paving the way for the invention of TV.
|fame=28
|art=22
|fth=35
|civ=24
|tech=45
|ss1=Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail DEF +50
|ss7=Snail DEF +50<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill I.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: Snail DEF +20
}}
